data.title: ManageWare Solutions Signals a New Era for Workers' Compensation Technology with Appointment of Industry Leader Bryan Hunziker as Chief Growth Officer
data.description: In MESA, Arizona, a recent development in the workers' compensation industry highlights a shift away from traditional technology limitations. In the past, systems for claims, utilization review, case management, bill review, provider networks, document management, and clinical review operated independently. This resulted in separate platforms, workflows, and integrations. However, a new connected ecosystem is emerging that aims to streamline processes. This move signifies a departure from the previous fragmented approach, bringing together various aspects of the industry for enhanced efficiency.

data.title: One Click, One Attacker-Controlled Agentic Insider: Zenity Labs Uncovers ‘AgentForger,’ a ChatGPT Vulnerability
data.description: Zenity Labs has revealed a significant vulnerability named AgentForger affecting OpenAI’s ChatGPT Workspace Agents at the AI Agent Security Summit in New York. This security flaw has far-reaching implications for users of the platform, potentially exposing them to risks associated with unauthorized access and information breaches. The disclosure underscores the importance of robust security measures in AI technologies, with the vulnerability posing a threat to the integrity of data and privacy. The exact impact of AgentForger on users remains unclear, but it serves as a stark reminder of the ongoing challenges in safeguarding digital environments. Users of OpenAI’s ChatGPT Workspace Agents should remain vigilant and monitor updates and patches from the platform to mitigate the risks associated with AgentForger.
China issues security reminder to citizens in Saudi Arabia.

data.title: DISCO Appoints Andre Mintz to Board of Directors
data.description: In Austin, Texas, DISCO, a prominent provider of litigation technology listed on NYSE under LAW, shared news of the appointment of Andre Mintz to its Board of Directors on July 21, 2026. Mintz, a seasoned information security executive with prior roles at Meta and experience as a board member for public companies, brings a substantial amount of expertise to DISCO. Scott Hill, the Chairman of the Board, praised Mintz's extensive data security background gained from working in complex risk environments globally.

data.title: Elio Raises $21M to Build Sensing for the AI Era
data.description: A technology company in Silicon Valley, California, Elio, introduced a new funding round of $21 million. The investment was spearheaded by Innovation Endeavors and Xora, along with contributions from Kevin Weil and Scribble VC. Prior backers UpWest and Resolute Ventures, who spearheaded the company's previous funding round, are also part of this round. Elio specializes in developing sensors specifically for artificial intelligence applications, diverging from traditional sensors designed for human vision. These sensors are tailored to capture a predetermined view of the environment, aligned with what is perceptible to the human eye.

data.title: Dimassi’s Mediterranean Buffet Leverages Square as It Expands Twenty-Four Location Portfolio
data.description: Square has revealed that Dimassi’s Mediterranean Buffet, a well-known Mediterranean buffet chain in the US, has extended its partnership with Square as it looks to expand further in the country. Dimassi’s currently runs 24 establishments in Texas and California, and is set to open three more restaurants by 2026, with plans for additional expansion in the future. In anticipation of this growth, the brand is increasing its utilization of Square’s platform for its operations.

data.title: FINNY Executives Eden Ovadia, Victoria Toli and Theo Janson Receive ESGR Patriot Award
data.description: In New York City, following the US250 Celebration and Fleet Week, the U.S. Department of Defense recently honored FINNY executives for their continuous support of servicemembers. The founders of FINNY – Eden Ovadia, Victoria Toli, and Theo Janson – were individually awarded the Patriot Award by the New York office of Employer Support of the Guard and Reserve (ESGR). This award acknowledges their exceptional dedication as employers who exceed expectations in supporting the military personnel.

data.title: Binance partners with STOP THE TRAFFIK to combat human trafficking, enhancing compliance with intelligence and training.
data.description: The collaboration with an external party significantly enhances Binance's compliance measures by offering expertise and education to identify crypto transactions associated with human trafficking and child exploitation.

data.title: Austin Regional Clinic Cuts Documentation Time by 18.5% and Optimizes Coding Accuracy Using Suki
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Austin Regional Clinic (ARC) has joined forces with Suki, a top player in Ambient Clinical Intelligence (ACI). ARC, a major multispecialty medical group in Central Texas, catering to over 700,000 patients in 15 communities through 40 locations, revealed this partnership. The joint effort is proving beneficial, enhancing clinician efficiency, coding accuracy, and AI adoption. This collaboration showcases tangible improvements resulting from ambient technology.

data.title: WellSky® Launches Care Transition Intelligence Dashboards to Turn Data Into Outcomes
data.description: An expansion of the WellSky CarePort Care Transitions Dashboard Suite was unveiled by WellSky in Overland Park, Kansas. The introduction includes intelligence dashboards, enhancing the suite's capabilities.

data.title: Evofem Biosciences Celebrates Shipment of Its 500,000th Unit of PHEXX®, Representing Hormone-Free Protection from Unintended Pregnancy for 6 Million Acts of Sex
data.description: In San Diego, Evofem Biosciences, Inc. (OTCID: EVFM) has revealed the delivery of its 500,000th box of PHEXX®. PHEXX® is an FDA-approved hormone-free contraceptive vaginal gel comprising lactic acid, citric acid, and potassium bitartrate. This product is the sole one of its kind available on prescription for on-demand contraception. The company considers this event to be a significant milestone, showcasing the increasing demand among women for contraception options that cater to their individual preferences, routines, and medical needs.

data.title: Workato and L&T Technology Services Launch FinShield AI, a Fraud Investigation Assistant
data.description: Workato, a prominent Control and Execution Platform for Enterprise AI based in Palo Alto, California, revealed that L&T Technology Services (LTTS), a key player in Engineering Intelligence Solutions and ER&D Consulting Services and also a significant partner of Workato Global Systems Integrator, has introduced FinShield AI on the Workato Agentic Marketplace. FinShield AI is an AI agent specifically designed for fraud investigation. This endeavor aims to streamline the resource-heavy process of fraud case review.

data.title: Altus Power Partners with New Leaf Energy on Development of Five Community Solar Projects in Virginia
data.description: A major commercial-scale power company, Altus Power, based in Stamford, Connecticut, has revealed the purchase of five community solar projects from New Leaf Energy. These projects, totaling 32 MW, are currently being developed in Virginia. They will be incorporated into the shared solar initiative of Appalachian Power Company (APCo) and are anticipated to provide clean energy advantages to around 5,000 households. These ground-mounted installations mark Altus Power's debut into the Virginia community solar sector and will significantly expand their presence in the region.

data.title: FAA Selects Tetra Tech for $27 Million Major Airspace Redesign Task Order Contract
data.description: In Pasadena, California, Tetra Tech, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TTEK, has been chosen by the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for a significant project. The FAA has awarded Tetra Tech a $27 million task order as part of the Program Support Services contract. This task order will entail providing technical, analytical, and program management support for the FAA's major airspace redesign program. The contract duration is set for four years, during which Tetra Tech engineers will be involved in this project.

data.title: Boyd Watterson Global Names John Creswell Global Chief Client Officer to Accelerate Global Growth and Client Engagement
data.description: Boyd Watterson Global has appointed John Creswell as the new Global Chief Client Officer, showcasing the company's commitment to expansion and development as a top global alternatives investment platform. In his newly created role, Creswell will be responsible for managing worldwide sales, client interaction, and marketing strategies in the United States, Europe, and APAC regions. This move signifies the firm's dedication to enhancing investor access to its services and bolstering its global presence.

data.title: Evolution Well Services Announces Two-Year Extension with Large Independent Operator
data.description: In The Woodlands, Texas, Evolution Well Services, a prominent company specializing in electric hydraulic fracturing, has recently secured a two-year extension for providing high-efficiency fracking services for an existing E&P partner. This agreement underlines the significant value that Evolution has consistently provided to its client over time, showcasing the company's reliability and expertise in serving as a trusted ally to top E&P operators in the sector. This development highlights Evolution's ongoing success in the industry and cements its position as a preferred partner for E&P operations.

data.title: Partnership with EnergyHub, Sunrun, and The Mobility House to Test Massachusetts Residential Vehicle-to-Grid Program for Eversource and National Grid Customers
data.description: In New York, Eversource, National Grid, EnergyHub, Sunrun, and The Mobility House have teamed up to conduct a collaborative initiative to explore vehicle-to-grid (V2G) capabilities in Massachusetts. This venture will allow eligible residential customers of Eversource and National Grid in Massachusetts to register their V2G-enabled electric vehicles (EVs) in the ConnectedSolutions program. This program, aimed at enhancing grid flexibility and smart charging technology, will assess the integration of V2G technology by leveraging flexible capacity.

data.title: Mustang Extreme Environmental Services Announces Strategic Transaction to Prioritize Growth
data.description: In Fairmount, West Virginia, Mustang Extreme Environmental Services has disclosed the sale of its environmental lining and water management assets in the Western and Southwestern regions of the United States to Mustang Containment Solutions, LLC. This move aims to fortify Mustang Extreme's primary environmental solutions sector and facilitate ongoing investment efforts. Mustang Extreme is renowned for its expertise in environmental containment, water management, ground protection, and remote site access. The sale signifies a strategic decision to enhance the company's environmental solutions operations.
